workflow.name: KDBP Architecture
workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_kdbp/core/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} tailored to {user_skill_level}
COLLABORATIVE ARCHITECTURE DISCOVERY — peer partnership, not client-vendor
Output: Single architecture.md document built progressively through all steps
A/P/C MENUS: After each major content section, offer [A]dvanced Elicitation, [P]arty Mode, [C]ontinue
DBP BOOKEND PATTERN: Step 0 loads behaviors. Step 7 records session ledger.

step.goal: Load behavior values into hot tier
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-00-behavior-load.md

step.goal: Initialize workflow — detect continuation, discover input docs
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-01-init.md

step.goal: Analyze project context — requirements, constraints, scale
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-02-context.md

step.goal: Evaluate starter templates and technology selection
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03-starter.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04-decisions.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05-patterns.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-06-structure-validation.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-07-completion.md
